error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed — check your API key. Enable debug logging for details (see description below).
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check your network and enable debug logging for details.
error.no_printers: Connected successfully but no printers were found. Make sure your printer is registered in Prusa Connect.
error.printer_not_found: Selected printer could not be found.

user.title: Prusa Connect
user.description: Choose how to connect to your Prusa printer.

local.title: PrusaLink (Local Connection)
local.description:
Connect directly to your printer on the local network.

Find the API key in your printer's web interface at **http://your-printer-ip** → Settings → API Key.

For debug logs, add to `configuration.yaml`:
```
logger:
  logs:
    custom_components.prusa_connect: debug
```

cloud.title: Prusa Connect (Cloud)
cloud.description:
Connect via the Prusa Connect cloud at [{prusa_connect_url}]({prusa_connect_url}).

Find your API key at **connect.prusa3d.com** → select your printer → **Settings** tab → scroll to **API keys**. This is the same key used in PrusaSlicer and OrcaSlicer.

For debug logs, add to `configuration.yaml`:
```
logger:
  logs:
    custom_components.prusa_connect: debug
```

select_printer.title: Select Printer
select_printer.description: Choose which printer to add to Home Assistant.
